# mlr3automl

Package website: [release](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/) \|
[dev](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/dev/)

**mlr3automl** is the Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) package of the
[mlr3](https://mlr-org.com/) ecosystem. It automatically selects the
most suitable machine learning algorithm and tunes its hyperparameters
for a given task. The package includes 10 learners from the
`mlr3learners` package, ranging from simple models like `glmnet` to more
powerful algorithms such as `ranger` and `xgboost`. Leveraging the
`mlr3pipelines` package, it constructs sophisticated preprocessing
graphs with multiple parallel branches, which are jointly optimized
using the `mlr3tuning` package. The optimization is driven by
Asynchronous Decentralized Bayesian Optimization (ADBO), enabling
efficient and scalable AutoML.

## Installation

Install the development version from GitHub:

``` r
pak::pkg_install("mlr-org/mlr3automl")
```

## Examples

``` r
library("mlr3automl")

rush_plan(n_workers = 2, worker_type = "mirai")
mirai::daemons(2)

task = tsk("spam")

learner = lrn("classif.auto",
  terminator = trm("evals", n_evals = 100)
)

learner$train(task)
```

## Test with Redis

To test the package, set the `RUSH_TEST_USE_REDIS` environment variable
to `true`. The test suite deletes the Redis database before execution,
so never run it against a production server.

``` r
Sys.setenv(RUSH_TEST_USE_REDIS = "true")
```

# Package index

## Auto Learners

- [`LearnerClassifAuto`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerClassifAuto.md)
  : Classification AutoML Learner
- [`LearnerRegrAuto`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerRegrAuto.md)
  : Regression AutoML Learner

## Classification Auto Learners

- [`LearnerClassifAutoCatboost`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerClassifAutoCatboost.md)
  : Classification Gradient Boosted Decision Trees Auto Learner
- [`LearnerClassifAutoFastai`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerClassifAutoFastai.md)
  : Classification Fastai Auto Learner
- [`LearnerClassifAutoFTTransformer`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerClassifAutoFTTransformer.md)
  : Classification FT-Transformer Auto Learner
- [`LearnerClassifAutoGlmnet`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerClassifAutoGlmnet.md)
  : Classification GLM with Elastic Net Regularization Auto Learner
- [`LearnerClassifAutoKKNN`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerClassifAutoKKNN.md)
  : Classification k-Nearest-Neighbor Auto Learner
- [`LearnerClassifAutoLightGBM`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerClassifAutoLightGBM.md)
  : Classification LightGBM Auto Learner
- [`LearnerClassifAutoMLP`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerClassifAutoMLP.md)
  : Classification MLP Auto Learner
- [`LearnerClassifAutoRanger`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerClassifAutoRanger.md)
  : Classification Ranger Auto Learner
- [`LearnerClassifAutoResNet`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerClassifAutoResNet.md)
  : Classification ResNet Auto Learner
- [`LearnerClassifAutoSVM`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerClassifAutoSVM.md)
  : Classification SVM Auto Learner
- [`LearnerClassifAutoTabPFN`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerClassifAutoTabPFN.md)
  : Classification TabPFN Auto Learner
- [`LearnerClassifAutoXgboost`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerClassifAutoXgboost.md)
  : Classification XGBoost Auto Learner

## Regression Auto Learners

- [`LearnerRegrAutoCatboost`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerRegrAutoCatboost.md)
  : Regression Gradient Boosted Decision Trees Auto Learner
- [`LearnerRegrAutoFTTransformer`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerRegrAutoFTTransformer.md)
  : Regression FT-Transformer Auto Learner
- [`LearnerRegrAutoGlmnet`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerRegrAutoGlmnet.md)
  : Regression GLM with Elastic Net Regularization Auto Learner
- [`LearnerRegrAutoKKNN`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerRegrAutoKKNN.md)
  : Regression k-Nearest-Neighbor Auto Learner
- [`LearnerRegrAutoLightGBM`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerRegrAutoLightGBM.md)
  : Regression LightGBM Auto Learner
- [`LearnerRegrAutoMLP`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerRegrAutoMLP.md)
  : Regression MLP Auto Learner
- [`LearnerRegrAutoRanger`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerRegrAutoRanger.md)
  : Regression Ranger Auto Learner
- [`LearnerRegrAutoResNet`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerRegrAutoResNet.md)
  : Regression ResNet Auto Learner
- [`LearnerRegrAutoSVM`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerRegrAutoSVM.md)
  : Regression SVM Auto Learner
- [`LearnerRegrAutoTabPFN`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerRegrAutoTabPFN.md)
  : Regression TabPFN Auto Learner
- [`LearnerRegrAutoXgboost`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/LearnerRegrAutoXgboost.md)
  : Regression XGBoost Auto Learner

## Auto Configuration

- [`Auto`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/Auto.md) : Auto
  Class
- [`AutoCatboost`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/AutoCatboost.md)
  : Catboost Auto
- [`AutoExtraTrees`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/AutoExtraTrees.md)
  : Extra Trees Auto
- [`AutoFastai`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/AutoFastai.md)
  : Fastai Auto
- [`AutoFTTransformer`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/AutoFTTransformer.md)
  : FTTransformer Auto
- [`AutoGlmnet`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/AutoGlmnet.md)
  : Glmnet Auto
- [`AutoKknn`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/AutoKknn.md) :
  Kknn Auto
- [`AutoLda`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/AutoLda.md) : Lda
  Auto
- [`AutoLightgbm`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/AutoLightgbm.md)
  : Lightgbm Auto
- [`AutoMlp`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/AutoMlp.md) : Mlp
  Auto
- [`AutoRanger`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/AutoRanger.md)
  : Ranger Auto
- [`AutoResNet`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/AutoResNet.md)
  : ResNet Auto
- [`AutoSvm`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/AutoSvm.md) : Svm
  Auto
- [`AutoTabpfn`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/AutoTabpfn.md)
  : Tabpfn Auto
- [`AutoXgboost`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/AutoXgboost.md)
  : Xgboost Auto

## Dictionary

- [`mlr_auto`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/mlr_auto.md) :
  Dictionary of Auto Objects

## Callbacks

- [`mlr3automl.initial_design_runtime`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/mlr3automl.initial_design_runtime.md)
  : Initial Design Runtime Limit Callback

## Package

- [`mlr3automl`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/mlr3automl-package.md)
  [`mlr3automl-package`](https://mlr3automl.mlr-org.com/reference/mlr3automl-package.md)
  : mlr3automl: AutoML extension for 'mlr3'
